testcase.name: TurboFix Accessibility Audits (axe-core) › Kaizen Dashboard accessibility audit
TurboFix Accessibility Audits (axe-core) › Main Dashboard accessibility audit
testcase.system-err: [Axe Warning] Found 1 serious/critical accessibility warnings on main dashboard.

testcase.name: Dashboard End-to-End Framework Tests › should render the plant status pulse strip with core KPIs
Dashboard End-to-End Framework Tests › should render the priority row with queue, reliability, and cost-impact cards
Dashboard End-to-End Framework Tests › should expand a category tab and collapse it back on second click
Dashboard End-to-End Framework Tests › should open the priority queue drilldown on click
Dashboard Premium UI Tests › should verify new glassmorphic styles and animations on dashboard
capture Kaizen Dashboard screenshots and verify UX layout
Lay Owner Dashboard User Journey & Feature Suite (/dashboard.html) › TC-DASH-01: Plant status pulse strip shows availability and core KPIs
Lay Owner Dashboard User Journey & Feature Suite (/dashboard.html) › TC-DASH-02: Reliability card surfaces MTBF, MTTR, and repeat-breakdown signal
Lay Owner Dashboard User Journey & Feature Suite (/dashboard.html) › TC-DASH-03: Financial impact card shows downtime and maintenance cost
Lay Owner Dashboard User Journey & Feature Suite (/dashboard.html) › TC-DASH-04: Operational efficiency KPI cards render with benchmark hints
Lay Owner Dashboard User Journey & Feature Suite (/dashboard.html) › TC-DASH-05: Cost management KPI cards render with RAV and emergency-cost ratios
Lay Owner Dashboard User Journey & Feature Suite (/dashboard.html) › TC-DASH-06: Priority Queue Inspection & Drilldown Scroll
Lay Owner Dashboard User Journey & Feature Suite (/dashboard.html) › TC-DASH-07: Strategic planning section renders the shift handover panel
Machines Page Workspace & Sub-Tabs Tests › should load machines workspace and successfully click through all 9 sub-tabs
QRGateway - Worst Case Scenarios › Should handle offline submission and queue ticket locally
QRGateway - Worst Case Scenarios › Should retry on transient network failures
QRGateway - Worst Case Scenarios › Should handle API timeout gracefully
QRGateway - Worst Case Scenarios › Should handle microphone permission denied
QRGateway - Worst Case Scenarios › Should handle camera permission denied for photo upload
QRGateway - Worst Case Scenarios › Should handle no speech detected error
QRGateway - Worst Case Scenarios › Should handle transcription API failure
QRGateway - Worst Case Scenarios › Should handle SpeechRecognition API unavailable
QRGateway - Worst Case Scenarios › Should validate phone number format on phone gate
QRGateway - Worst Case Scenarios › Should handle very long issue descriptions
QRGateway - Worst Case Scenarios › Should handle special characters in input
QRGateway - Worst Case Scenarios › Should handle empty/whitespace-only submission
QRGateway - Worst Case Scenarios › Should handle corrupted image file
QRGateway - Worst Case Scenarios › Should handle very large image file (>50MB)
QRGateway - Worst Case Scenarios › Should handle storage upload failure
QRGateway - Worst Case Scenarios › Should handle rapid form submissions
QRGateway - Worst Case Scenarios › Should handle language change during submission
QRGateway - Worst Case Scenarios › Should handle localStorage quota exceeded
testcase.system-err: (node:10625) ExperimentalWarning: localStorage is not available because --localstorage-file was not provided. (Use `node --trace-warnings ...` to show where the warning was created)

testcase.name: QRGateway - Worst Case Scenarios › Should handle speechSynthesis API failure
QRGateway - Worst Case Scenarios › Should handle back button during phone gate
QRGateway - Worst Case Scenarios › Should persist reporter phone across page reload
QRGateway - Worst Case Scenarios › Should handle machine details fetch failure
QRGateway - Worst Case Scenarios › Should handle duplicate check failure gracefully
QRGateway - Worst Case Scenarios › Should handle ticket log failure with fallback
QRGateway - Worst Case Scenarios › Should handle rapid language switches without state corruption
QRGateway - Worst Case Scenarios › Should handle zero-width screen edge case
QR Gateway Issue Reporting Flow › Scenario 1: Reporter Mobile Identification (Phone Gate)
